rulings.Case Title: ELAINE PERCY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Fifth Amended Complaint For Survival And Wrongful Death-Asbestos
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 27, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendants Cahill Contractors, Inc. and Cahill Construction Co., Inc.'s motion to strike is off calendar at the moving parties' request. = (503/TLJ)

On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 27, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Pacific Coast Building Products, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court's own motion to March 29, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ISAAC SLADE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 27, 2012 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 3, Defendant Dal-Tile Corp.¿s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court¿s own motion to March 29, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. = (503/TLJ)
